allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Clean up repository: remove temporary files and update .gitignore

Quick Clean optimization phase:
- Remove all .DS_Store files \(4 files\)
- Delete temp/ directory with unused research draft
- Remove _____________form/ directory with template files
- Delete temporary image files \(voucher_temp.png, banner_temp.png, mobis_temp.png\)
- Update .gitignore with comprehensive rules for:
  - macOS system files
  - Temporary directories and files
  - Log files
  - Python virtual environments
  - Editor configurations
  - Temporary images

This cleanup improves repository hygiene and prevents unwanted files 
from being tracked in version control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
